PipelineStage.description: Kanban stages (PRD §4). Ordered; time-in-stage flags key off the transitions.
PipelineStage.title: PipelineStage

StageForecast.description: One stage's slice of the forecast — count and probability-weighted expected deals.
StageForecast.title: StageForecast

description:
A currency-free pipeline forecast: deal *volume*, probability-weighted by stage.

The £ value forecast is a GRS-0012 concern (Money enters there); this stays in deal-count units
so score/volume and currency never mix (ADR-0002).

open_prospects.description: Prospects not in a terminal stage.
open_prospects.title: Open Prospects

weighted_expected_deals.description: Σ per-prospect win probability over NON-SETTLED prospects (GRS-0137) — the expected count of NEW wins from the open book, equal to the sum of the win-probability pills. Already-won (in-delivery) and lost deals are excluded.
weighted_expected_deals.title: Weighted Expected Deals

title: PipelineForecast
